item.title: Scattered timeout constants in build/installer, build/launcher/deploy+connect, and design/configure/ollama
item.intent: All timeout constants in build/installer, build/launcher/deploy+connect, and design/configure/ollama have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No local timeout literals remain in these files.
item.description: Four more local timeout constants not yet in config/defaults.ts, continuing the BUG-038/BUG-039/BUG-040 sweep: src/build/installer/source.ts:26 (CLONE_TIMEOUT_MS=300_000), src/build/installer/source.ts:29 (BUILD_TIMEOUT_MS=600_000), src/build/launcher/deploy.ts:34 (COMPOSE_TIMEOUT_MS=120_000), src/build/launcher/connect.ts:24 (GATEWAY_RPC_TIMEOUT_MS=10_000 — note: BUG-038 adds this to defaults.ts as part of gateway/ sweep; verify it's exported and reuse it in connect.ts rather than adding a duplicate), src/design/configure/ollama.ts:11 (GENERATE_TIMEOUT_MS=120_000). Steps: (1) verify BUG-038 has already exported GATEWAY_RPC_TIMEOUT_MS=10_000 to defaults.ts — if yes, import it in connect.ts and remove local; (2) add INSTALL_CLONE_TIMEOUT_MS=300_000, INSTALL_BUILD_TIMEOUT_MS=600_000, DEPLOY_COMPOSE_TIMEOUT_MS=120_000, OLLAMA_GENERATE_TIMEOUT_MS=120_000 to src/config/defaults.ts; (3) import and replace in each file; (4) run build/ and design/ tests. Scope: 5 files, no logic change. Do NOT touch firewall.ts.
